testcase.name: imports and uses ToolForm with toolKey freeGenerate
uses copywritingFreeGenerateInput schema
ToolForm freeGenerate case renders ScriptTypeSelect + ElementsMultiSelect + TextareaField
renders ToolResult with freeGenerate toolKey after submit
renders FeedbackButton with CopywritingAgent agentId
passes with valid scriptType + elements + topic
fails when scriptType is invalid
fails when elements is empty
fails when topic exceeds 500 chars
fails when elements exceed 8 items
calls trpc.copywriting.freeGenerate.useMutation
calls setResult on success (handleSuccess)
result state controls ToolResult visibility
ToolForm shows toast.error on mutation failure (REJ-035)
Generate.tsx does not manually rollback LS on error (REJ-035)
getToolLsKey generates correct key for freeGenerate input
Generate.tsx uses getToolLsKey with freeGenerate and input suffix
ToolForm uses input suffix for LS (not form)
LS-first dual-write: localStorage.setItem in Generate.tsx handleSubmit
AbortController on unmount prevents state update after navigate away (AC-8)
Generate.tsx uses trpc.history.detail.useQuery with historyId
query is disabled when historyId is absent (enabled: !!historyId)
